content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.conversation_export
FILE: cosmos/memory/conversation_export.py (863 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Conversation Export - Export memory and context as shareable formats

Features:
- Multiple export formats: JSON, Markdown, HTML
- Selective export (date range, tags, topics)
- Human-readable conversation transcripts
- Shareable HTML with styling
- Knowledge graph export
- Memory statistics su

CLASSES:
- ConversationExportFormat(Enum): Export format options.
- ExportOptions: Options for conversation export.
- ExportResult: Result of an export operation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- ConversationExporter: Export conversations, memories, and context in multiple formats.

Supports:
- JS
  Methods: async def export(self, options: Optional[ExportOptions]=None, output_path: Optional[str]=None) -> Ex
  Methods: async def export_to_string(self, options: Optional[ExportOptions]=None) -> ExportResult
  Methods: def list_exports(self) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def delete_export(self, file_path: str) -> bool
